Product Manager - Product Builder Defined

8/25/2024 #pm#google#ai#product management

Product Manager to Product Builder

𝑻𝒉𝒆 𝑵𝒆𝒘 𝑬𝒓𝒂 𝒐𝒇 𝑷𝑴: 𝑻𝒉𝒆 𝑷𝒉𝒂𝒔𝒆-𝒃𝒚-𝑷𝒉𝒂𝒔𝒆 𝑨𝑰 𝑬𝒗𝒐𝒍𝒖𝒕𝒊𝒐𝒏 🛠️

The traditional PM lifecycle is being compressed. What used to take quarters now takes weeks. The roles we once considered distinct—Designer, Researcher, Engineer—are merging into a single, high-velocity execution layer.

Yesterday, we discussed the core responsibilities of a Product Manager (Read that here: [https://lnkd.in/esrX8XUR]). Today, we look at how that journey evolves from a Linear Relay to an AI-Powered Loop.

𝑻𝒉𝒆 𝑺𝒉𝒊𝒇𝒕: 📢 𝑺𝒕𝒓𝒂𝒕𝒆𝒈𝒚 & 𝑽𝒊𝒔𝒊𝒐𝒏 → Knowledge Orchestration: Moving from manual report reading to AI-driven gap analysis in minutes. 📢 𝑷𝒓𝒊𝒐𝒓𝒊𝒕𝒊𝒛𝒂𝒕𝒊𝒐𝒏 → Infinite Divergence: Instantly stress-testing ideas against 50+ simulated personas or understanding exercises by creating multiple MVPs. 📢 𝑬𝒙𝒆𝒄𝒖𝒕𝒊𝒐𝒏 → Prompt for Reality: PRDs aren’t just docs anymore; they are the technical logic that feeds directly into AI IDEs.

❓ Addressing the ”𝑷𝒓𝒐𝒅𝒖𝒄𝒕 𝑩𝒖𝒊𝒍𝒅𝒆𝒓” 𝑭𝑨𝑸𝒔:

👉 𝘋𝘰𝘦𝘴 ”𝘝𝘪𝘣𝘦 𝘊𝘰𝘥𝘪𝘯𝘨” 𝘮𝘦𝘢𝘯 𝘢𝘭𝘭 𝘗𝘔𝘴 𝘴𝘩𝘰𝘶𝘭𝘥 𝘮𝘢𝘴𝘵𝘦 𝘥𝘦𝘴𝘪𝘨𝘯? Not necessarily. Mastery still comes from your core niche. But for a quick prototype, tools like Stitch allow you to manifest and expand your vision independently without waiting in a design queue.

👉 𝘋𝘰 𝘗𝘔𝘴 𝘯𝘦𝘦𝘥 𝘵𝘰 𝘭𝘦𝘢𝘳𝘯 𝘩𝘰𝘸 𝘵𝘰 𝘤𝘰𝘥𝘦? You don’t need to be a software engineer, but you do need to be a Logic Orchestrator. By leveraging AI daily and using tools like Opal, Canvas, or AI Studio, you can iterate on functional prototypes without the traditional heavy lifting.

👉 𝘋𝘰𝘦𝘴 𝘳𝘦𝘢𝘭-𝘵𝘪𝘮𝘦 𝘱𝘳𝘰𝘵𝘰𝘵𝘺𝘱𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘤𝘩𝘢𝘯𝘨𝘦 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘗𝘔 𝘳𝘰𝘭𝘦? Absolutely. We are moving from “managing a process” to “building a product.” Every stage of the lifecycle is being redefined, creating a massive differentiation in how we lead.

👉 𝘞𝘩𝘢𝘵 𝘥𝘰 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘯𝘦𝘦𝘥 𝘧𝘰𝘳 𝘵𝘩𝘪𝘴 𝘗𝘳𝘰𝘥𝘶𝘤𝘵 𝘉𝘶𝘪𝘭𝘥𝘦𝘳 𝘵𝘰𝘰𝘭𝘴𝘦𝘵? We’ve seen the tools vendors are providing in this this thread (https://lnkd.in/eKErHMte), but the real magic is in how you leverage them to build your personal stack.

Tomorrow: I’m breaking down the Product Builder Toolkit. What you can use today for each of these phases.

Are you building yet, or still just managing? Let’s talk in the comments. 👇

Do you have other topics in mind, please do suggest

If you have questions/comments/suggestions, please reach out to me kanch@cloudrace.info
